$schema: Edit this file to describe your demo. Each scene = one beat in the walkthrough.
globalStyle: Confident, slightly understated executive tone — like a CTO walking a board through a new capability. Natural pacing, no overselling.

scenes.narration: Welcome. Let me show you what changes when your operational signals stop sitting in dashboards and start telling you what to do.
[pause] The home view surfaces every active anomaly across the business. Not a feed of events — a ranked list of decisions waiting on someone.

scenes.style: Slightly slower and more deliberate, like you're making a point you want to land.
scenes.narration: [emphasis] Twelve hours. That's how far ahead this caught the inventory mismatch — before it would have surfaced in any weekly report.
This is what we mean by always-on. The system isn't waiting for your next review cycle. It's already working.
